permissions.name: settings.read
permissions.description: Base read permission. Group-specific gating on top via AsSetting.permission.

permissions.name: settings.view-sensitive
permissions.description: Unmask sensitive fields via ?reveal=true. Every use audit-logged.

permissions.name: settings.update.notification
permissions.description: Auto-seeded per registered group at boot. This is the template.

permissions.name: settings.update.preferences
permissions.description: User-scope settings. Everyone can update own preferences.

permissions.name: platform.settings.update-system
permissions.description: Write system-scope settings. Platform admin only.
